# GeoCam - Aerial, Street, and Indoor Geospatial Imagery Platform

> GeoCam enables organizations to capture their own "Street View" of anything, anywhere—building geospatial digital twins from 360 imagery without LiDAR.

## What is GeoCam?

GeoCam is a reality capture platform that transforms 360 imagery into GIS-ready asset data and 3D outputs. Users capture imagery using professional-grade 360 cameras or drones, then use GeoCam's visual positioning engine to create accurate, measurable maps.

## Core Capabilities

- **Capture Modes**: Aerial (drone), Street (vehicle/walking), Indoor (facilities)
- **Visual Positioning System**: Fuses hundreds of captures across different lighting conditions into seamless, accurate maps
- **In-Browser Tools**: Tag, measure, and map assets directly in the web viewer
- **GIS Integration**: SSO and direct edit into ArcGIS Online or Enterprise; export to GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV
- **PII Protection**: Automatic face and license plate blurring on all projects
- **AI Features**: Custom detection models, 3D reconstruction from imagery

## Target Users

- Public Works Directors: Document roads, signs, signals, ADA compliance
- GIS Managers: Populate GIS directly from imagery with ArcGIS integration
- Facility Managers: Document indoor spaces, track equipment, plan maintenance
- Public Safety Chiefs: Fire pre-plans, scene investigation, waterway navigation
- Utilities: Electric distribution, substations, vaults, gas infrastructure, water systems
- Fiber & Telecom: As-built documentation, strand mapping, pole attachments
- Campus and Parks & Recreation: Campus grounds, park assets, trails, facilities, and visitor-facing documentation

## Data Models

- **Geospatial**: Local Government Public Works, Street Signs with Codes, Fiber Engineering, Electric Utility, Facilities Management, Public Safety Pre-Plans, ArcGIS Indoors, Apple IMDF
- **CAD Modeling**: Indoor Architecture LOD 300, Reflected Ceiling Plans

## Pricing

### Subscriptions
- **Pilot**: $5,000/week - One capture mode, full platform access, onboarding support
- **Annual**: $20,000/year - All capture modes, included users & VPS credits, SSO, API access
- **GeoCam Edge**: $40,000/year - Unlimited use, air-gapped deployment, command center ready

### Visual Positioning System Credits
- Aerial: $200 per square kilometer
- Street: $25 per kilometer
- Indoor: $0.10 per square meter
- Bulk discounts available for pre-purchasing credits

### User Licensing
- Viewer: $120/year - View imagery, access measurements, export data
- Admin: $2,500/year - Full platform access, capture management, user administration

### GeoCam Capture Experts
- Starting at $1,000/day for managed field teams
- Options for secure facilities and restricted areas

## Deployment Options

- **GeoCam Online**: Fully managed cloud service
- **GeoCam Appliance**: Managed service in data centers or remotely managed inside your network
- **GeoCam Edge**: Deploy in command centers and field operations for air-gapped environments

## Technical Details

- No LiDAR required - uses photogrammetry and visual positioning
- Measurement accuracy depends on capture conditions, image overlap, and scene geometry
- Designed for asset inventory, planning, and field verification workflows
- Not a replacement for licensed survey where required
- REST API available for programmatic access

## Company Information

- Website: https://www.geocam.xyz
- Contact: https://www.geocam.xyz/contact

## Key Differentiators

1. Build your own "Street View" for any environment (aerial, street, indoor)
2. Visual positioning engine handles varying lighting conditions
3. Direct ArcGIS integration with SSO
4. PII blurring included by default
5. Flexible deployment (cloud, appliance, edge/air-gapped)
6. Partner network for capture services
